import React,{useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Login=_ref=>{let{setIsLoggedIn,setUser}=_ref;const[email,setEmail]=useState('');const[password,setPassword]=useState('');const[error,setError]=useState('');const navigate=useNavigate();const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();setError('');if(!email||!password){setError('Please fill in all fields');return;}try{const res=await fetch('/api/auth/login',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email,password})});const data=await res.json();if(!res.ok)throw new Error(data.message||'Login failed');localStorage.setItem('token',data.token);localStorage.setItem('user',JSON.stringify(data.user));// Update parent component state
